channel.title: Explyra Suite - Updates
channel.description: Latest news, feature updates, and releases from Explyra.

item.title: Contact Us Page Now Live
item.description: Get in touch with the Explyra team. Reach out for support, partnerships, bug reports, or any inquiries about the Explyra Suite. Form submissions are saved securely via Firebase.

item.title: Support Explyra — Donation Page Launched
item.description: Support the Explyra Suite by donating via WhatsApp. Every contribution fuels server costs, new AI integrations, and scaling the ecosystem.

item.title: Explyra Developer Tools Hub Launched
item.description: The Explyra Developers Hub is now live with Code Minifier, Hash Generator, Password Generator, Link Shortener, Online IDE, and more tools.

item.title: Explyra Health Manager Now Available
item.description: Track workouts, sleep, nutrition, and mental wellness with AI-powered recommendations and live weather integration.

item.title: Explyra Learning Platform Launched
item.description: Expert-curated courses on Agentic AI, Prompt Engineering, and SEO — built for the next generation of digital professionals.

item.title: Welcome to the New Explyra Platform
item.description: We have launched our new PWA-enabled SaaS platform for enhanced productivity, robust developer utilities, and business management.

item.title: Meet Our Technical Team
item.description: Spotlight on Mitanshu Bhasin, our lead developer driving cybersecurity and innovation at Explyra.
